caption: The video features a man, identified as Bola Tinubu, delivering a speech at a podium. He is dressed in traditional attire, including a blue outfit and a matching hat with intricate designs. The setting appears to be a formal event or conference, possibly related to politics, as indicated by the text "PLUS POLITICS" on the screen. The caption "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU" suggests that he is addressing the nation's needs and his role in addressing them. The background includes a blurred image of another person wearing a hat, adding to the formal atmosphere. The video also displays logos for PlusTV Africa and social media handles, indicating it is being broadcasted on television channels such as DSTV CH 408 and StarTimes CH 308.
